chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 81 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.713/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.714/2023 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 06.02.2023 Mr. Mansoor Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for the applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency application is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This Criminal Miscellaneous Application is directed against the order dated 31.01.2023, whereby the learned Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Naushahro Feroze while allowing Crl. Misc. Appln. No.225 of 2023, filed by respondent No.3 under Sections 22-A & 22-B, Cr.P.C., directed to respondent No.2 (S.H.O., Police Station Padidan, District Naushahro Feroze) to record the statement of respondent No.3 and if cognizable offence is made out, the F.I.R. should be registered. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, learned Additional P.G., present in Court in some other matters, waives notice. Learned Counsel for the applicant, at the very outset, states that on merit he does not press instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application in case directions are given to respondent No.2 that no arrest shall be made in the F.I.R. to be lodged by respondent No.3 without collecting tangible evidence by the Investigating Officer. Order accordingly. The Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands disposed of in the above terms. Office is directed to communicate this order to respondent No.2 for compliance. J U D G E Abdul Basit
